description: TAM/SAM/SOM market sizing for Greenbay. Multiple methodologies preserved with scope labels.

segments_2030.name: Transit Fleet Orchestration
segments_2030.notes: EV transit buses entering managed depot operations

segments_2030.name: Freight Fleet Orchestration
segments_2030.notes: EV trucks at large operator depots (20+ vehicles)

segments_2030.name: Legacy Buses (mixed depot)
segments_2030.notes: Diesel buses at depots with ≥10% EV/AV requiring mixed orchestration

segments_2030.name: Legacy Trucks (mixed depot)
segments_2030.notes: Conservative floor: EU 6.2M total trucks (ACEA 2026); 35% managed depot = 2.2M EU + 1.7M NA ceiling = 3.9M. 2.6M excludes owner-operators.

segments_2030.name: Autonomous Fleet Infra Layer
segments_2030.notes: NA+EU confirmed 28K L4; 38K APAC L4 at 30% accessibility

segments_2030.name: Light Commercial Vehicles
segments_2030.notes: EV managed vans ex-China. 31.1M EU total LCVs (ACEA); 720K = 2.3% penetration — conservative floor

methodologies.label: Bottom-Up Fleet Orchestration TAM
methodologies.description: Segment-level vehicle counts × ARPU. Greenbay-specific orchestration market.
methodologies.source: Greenbay internal model (IEA GEO 2025, ACEA 2026, Samsara FY2025 10-K)
methodologies.sam_rationale: 83% of TAM — EU+NA primary markets, APAC emerging, China 30% accessible via JV/partner
methodologies.som_rationale: 5% SAM penetration by 2030 — ~45 major operator deployments. Samsara precedent: 5% US commercial trucking in 4yr post-Series A

methodologies.label: Top-Down Fleet Management Market
methodologies.description: Total fleet management software market. Broader than orchestration — includes telematics, routing, maintenance.

methodologies.label: Bottom-Up Customer Model
methodologies.description: Target customers × ACV × win rate. Used in fleet-orchestration dashboard.
methodologies.source: Greenbay Analysis — FTA NTD, UITP Europe, EV100 Climate Group

methodologies.label: EV Fleet Orchestration (SAM slice)
methodologies.description: 2% of top-down SAM earmarked for EV orchestration early adopters. Used in electrification-intel.
methodologies.som_rationale: ~2% of $32B SAM — EV fleet orchestration early adopter segment
